title: First Steps
subtitle: What to do in your first hour

pages.text: You lead, you do not solo

Bannerbound is a civilization game, not a survival grind. You are the leader of a band of citizens, not a lone adventurer. Your job is to organize their work, research new knowledge, and grow the settlement — the citizens do the gathering and building.

Start by gathering a little wood and stone by hand. Carve a &6Crafting Stone&r from cobblestone with a flint blade, then a &6Campfire&r. Right-click the Campfire to found your settlement and open its menus.
From the Campfire you reach Research, Citizens, Territory, Labor, and Policies. Almost everything you want to do flows through these menus and the Foreman's Rod.

pages.caption: The three things you need first
